sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_zaperson_extend_t (personnelid,zy,workunit,addtime,addoperator) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$zy$','$workunit$','$addtime$','$addoperator$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_extend_t SET zy = '$zy$', workunit = '$workunit$', updateoperator = '$updateoperator$', updatetime = '$updatetime$' WHERE personnelid = $personnelid$
sqlMap.select: select count(*) from p_zaperson_extend_t
select * from p_zaperson_extend_t
select * from p_zaperson_extend_t WHERE personnelid = $personnelid$
SELECT * FROM p_zaperson_du_t WHERE validflag =2 AND personnelid = $personnelid$ ORDER BY addtime DESC LIMIT 1
select count(*) from p_zaperson_du_t WHERE validflag >0 AND personnelid = $personnelid$

select du.id,du.personnelid,du.lssdqk,du.chsj,du.chjg,du.cfjg,du.clxq,du.dbfs,du.dbbw, du.validflag,du.addoperator,du.addtime,du.memo,du.phone, du.person_attribute as personAttribute, du.collect_source as collectSource,du.other_memo as otherMemo, du.home_province as homeProvince,du.home_city as homeCity,du.home_county as homeCounty, du.home_town as homeTown,du.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, du.home_detail as homeDetail,du.home_lng as homeLng,du.home_lat as homeLat, du.has_shedu_record as hasSheduRecord, du.collect_date as collectDate,du.case_address_list as caseAddressList from p_zaperson_du_t du LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON du.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 WHERE du.validflag >0 AND du.personnelid = $personnelid$ order by du.id desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_zaperson_du_t (personnelid,lssdqk,chsj,chjg,cfjg,clxq,dbfs,dbbw, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo,phone, person_attribute,collect_source,other_memo, home_province,home_city,home_county,home_town,home_police_station_id, home_detail,home_lng,home_lat,has_shedu_record,collect_date,case_address_list) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$lssdqk$','$chsj$','$chjg$','$cfjg$','$clxq$','$dbfs$','$dbbw$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$','$phone$', '$personAttribute$','$collectSource$','$otherMemo$', '$homeProvince$','$homeCity$','$homeCounty$','$homeTown$',#homePoliceStationId#, '$homeDetail$','$homeLng$','$homeLat$',$hasSheduRecord$,'$collectDate$','$caseAddressList$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_du_t SET validflag=$validflag$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM p_zaperson_chang_t WHERE validflag =2 AND personnelid = $personnelid$ ORDER BY addtime DESC LIMIT 1
select count(*) from p_zaperson_chang_t WHERE validflag >0 AND personnelid = $personnelid$

select c.id,c.personnelid,c.chang_lsscqk,c.chang_scjs,c.chang_scbw,c.chang_myfs, c.chang_chsj,c.chang_chjg,c.chang_cfjg,c.chang_clxq, c.validflag,c.addoperator,c.addtime,c.memo, c.chang_method as changMethod,c.chang_type as changType, c.collect_source as collectSource,c.other_memo as otherMemo,c.is_minor_case as isMinorCase, c.home_province as homeProvince,c.home_city as homeCity,c.home_county as homeCounty, c.home_town as homeTown,c.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, c.home_detail as homeDetail,c.home_lng as homeLng,c.home_lat as homeLat, c.has_shechang_record as hasSechangRecord, c.collect_date as collectDate,c.case_address_list as caseAddressList from p_zaperson_chang_t c LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON c.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 WHERE c.validflag >0 AND c.personnelid = $personnelid$ order by c.id desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_zaperson_chang_t (personnelid,chang_lsscqk,chang_chsj,chang_chjg,chang_cfjg,chang_clxq,chang_myfs,chang_scbw,chang_scjs, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo, chang_method,chang_type,collect_source,other_memo,is_minor_case, home_province,home_city,home_county,home_town,home_police_station_id, home_detail,home_lng,home_lat,has_shechang_record,collect_date,case_address_list) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$chang_lsscqk$','$chang_chsj$','$chang_chjg$','$chang_cfjg$','$chang_clxq$','$chang_myfs$','$chang_scbw$','$chang_scjs$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$', '$changMethod$','$changType$','$collectSource$','$otherMemo$',$isMinorCase$, '$homeProvince$','$homeCity$','$homeCounty$','$homeTown$',#homePoliceStationId#, '$homeDetail$','$homeLng$','$homeLat$',$hasSechangRecord$,'$collectDate$','$caseAddressList$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_chang_t SET validflag=$validflag$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM p_zaperson_pei_t WHERE validflag =2 AND personnelid = $personnelid$ ORDER BY addtime DESC LIMIT 1
select count(*) from p_zaperson_pei_t WHERE validflag >0 AND personnelid = $personnelid$

select p.id,p.personnelid,p.collect_source as collectSource,p.collect_date as collectDate, p.activity_venue as activityVenue,p.other_memo as otherMemo, p.home_province as homeProvince,p.home_city as homeCity,p.home_county as homeCounty, p.home_town as homeTown,p.home_police_station_id as homePoliceStationId, d.departname as homePoliceStationName, p.home_detail as homeDetail,p.home_lng as homeLng,p.home_lat as homeLat, p.validflag,p.addoperator,p.addtime,p.memo from p_zaperson_pei_t p LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON p.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 WHERE p.validflag >0 AND p.personnelid = $personnelid$ order by p.id desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_zaperson_pei_t (personnelid,collect_source,collect_date,activity_venue,other_memo, home_province,home_city,home_county,home_town,home_police_station_id, home_detail,home_lng,home_lat, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$collectSource$','$collectDate$','$activityVenue$','$otherMemo$', '$homeProvince$','$homeCity$','$homeCounty$','$homeTown$',#homePoliceStationId#, '$homeDetail$','$homeLng$','$homeLat$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_pei_t SET validflag=$validflag$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_zaperson_case_address_t (record_id,record_type,province,city,county,town,detail_address,longitude,latitude,validflag,addtime) VALUES ($recordId$,$recordType$,'$province$','$city$','$county$','$town$','$detailAddress$','$longitude$','$latitude$',1,'$addtime$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_case_address_t SET validflag=0 WHERE record_id=$recordId$ AND record_type=$recordType$
sqlMap.select: SELECT id,record_id as recordId,record_type as recordType,province,city,county,town, detail_address as detailAddress,longitude,latitude,validflag,addtime FROM p_zaperson_case_address_t WHERE validflag=1 AND record_id=$recordId$ AND record_type=$recordType$ ORDER BY id ASC
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_homeplace_history_t ( personnelid, home_province, home_city, home_county, home_town, home_police_station_id, home_detail, home_lng, home_lat, validflag, addoperator, addtime ) VALUES ( #personnelid#, #province#, #city#, #county#, #town#, #policeStationId#, #detailAddress#, #longitude#, #latitude#, 1, #addoperator#, #addtime# )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.select: SELECT h.id,h.personnelid, h.home_province as province, h.home_city as city, h.home_county as county, h.home_town as town, h.home_police_station_id as policeStationId, d.departname as policeStationName, h.home_detail as detailAddress, h.home_lng as longitude, h.home_lat as latitude, h.validflag,h.addoperator,h.addtime FROM p_homeplace_history_t h LEFT JOIN sys_department_t_new d ON h.home_police_station_id = d.id AND d.validflag = 1 WHERE h.validflag=1 AND h.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY h.addtime DESC
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t (du_id, personnelid, aj_id, sldw, validflag, addtime) VALUES
(#[]ŌĆŗ.duId#, #[]ŌĆŗ.personnelid#, #[]ŌĆŗ.ajId#, #[]ŌĆŗ.sldw#, 1, #[]ŌĆŗ.addtime#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t SET validflag=0 WHERE du_id=$value$
sqlMap.select: SELECT aj.* FROM f_xt_xd_ajxx_new aj JOIN p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t r ON aj.id = r.aj_id WHERE r.du_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT d.* FROM p_zaperson_du_t d JOIN p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t r ON d.id = r.du_id WHERE r.aj_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT DISTINCT aj.* FROM f_xt_xd_ajxx_new aj JOIN p_zaperson_du_aj_rel_t r ON aj.id = r.aj_id WHERE r.personnelid = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t (du_id, personnelid, jq_id, cjdw, validflag, addtime) VALUES
(#[]ŌĆŗ.duId#, #[]ŌĆŗ.personnelid#, #[]ŌĆŗ.jqId#, #[]ŌĆŗ.cjdw#, 1, #[]ŌĆŗ.addtime#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t SET validflag=0 WHERE du_id=$value$
sqlMap.select: SELECT jq.* FROM f_xt_xd_jqxx_new jq JOIN p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t r ON jq.id = r.jq_id WHERE r.du_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT d.* FROM p_zaperson_du_t d JOIN p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t r ON d.id = r.du_id WHERE r.jq_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT DISTINCT jq.* FROM f_xt_xd_jqxx_new jq JOIN p_zaperson_du_jq_rel_t r ON jq.id = r.jq_id WHERE r.personnelid = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t (chang_id, personnelid, aj_id, sldw, validflag, addtime) VALUES
(#[]ŌĆŗ.changId#, #[]ŌĆŗ.personnelid#, #[]ŌĆŗ.ajId#, #[]ŌĆŗ.sldw#, 1, #[]ŌĆŗ.addtime#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t SET validflag=0 WHERE chang_id=$value$
sqlMap.select: SELECT aj.* FROM f_xt_xd_ajxx_new aj JOIN p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t r ON aj.id = r.aj_id WHERE r.chang_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT c.* FROM p_zaperson_chang_t c JOIN p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t r ON c.id = r.chang_id WHERE r.aj_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT DISTINCT aj.* FROM f_xt_xd_ajxx_new aj JOIN p_zaperson_chang_aj_rel_t r ON aj.id = r.aj_id WHERE r.personnelid = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t (chang_id, personnelid, jq_id, cjdw, validflag, addtime) VALUES
(#[]ŌĆŗ.changId#, #[]ŌĆŗ.personnelid#, #[]ŌĆŗ.jqId#, #[]ŌĆŗ.cjdw#, 1, #[]ŌĆŗ.addtime#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t SET validflag=0 WHERE chang_id=$value$
sqlMap.select: SELECT jq.* FROM f_xt_xd_jqxx_new jq JOIN p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t r ON jq.id = r.jq_id WHERE r.chang_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT c.* FROM p_zaperson_chang_t c JOIN p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t r ON c.id = r.chang_id WHERE r.jq_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT DISTINCT jq.* FROM f_xt_xd_jqxx_new jq JOIN p_zaperson_chang_jq_rel_t r ON jq.id = r.jq_id WHERE r.personnelid = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t (pei_id, personnelid, aj_id, sldw, validflag, addtime) VALUES
(#[]ŌĆŗ.peiId#, #[]ŌĆŗ.personnelid#, #[]ŌĆŗ.ajId#, #[]ŌĆŗ.sldw#, 1, #[]ŌĆŗ.addtime#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t SET validflag=0 WHERE pei_id=$value$
sqlMap.select: SELECT aj.* FROM f_xt_xd_ajxx_new aj JOIN p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t r ON aj.id = r.aj_id WHERE r.pei_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT p.* FROM p_zaperson_pei_t p JOIN p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t r ON p.id = r.pei_id WHERE r.aj_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT DISTINCT aj.* FROM f_xt_xd_ajxx_new aj JOIN p_zaperson_pei_aj_rel_t r ON aj.id = r.aj_id WHERE r.personnelid = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t (pei_id, personnelid, jq_id, cjdw, validflag, addtime) VALUES
(#[]ŌĆŗ.peiId#, #[]ŌĆŗ.personnelid#, #[]ŌĆŗ.jqId#, #[]ŌĆŗ.cjdw#, 1, #[]ŌĆŗ.addtime#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t SET validflag=0 WHERE pei_id=$value$
sqlMap.select: SELECT jq.* FROM f_xt_xd_jqxx_new jq JOIN p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t r ON jq.id = r.jq_id WHERE r.pei_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT p.* FROM p_zaperson_pei_t p JOIN p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t r ON p.id = r.pei_id WHERE r.jq_id = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT DISTINCT jq.* FROM f_xt_xd_jqxx_new jq JOIN p_zaperson_pei_jq_rel_t r ON jq.id = r.jq_id WHERE r.personnelid = $value$ AND r.validflag = 1
SELECT 1 FROM p_zaperson_du_t WHERE personnelid = $value$ AND validflag > 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT 1 FROM p_zaperson_chang_t WHERE personnelid = $value$ AND validflag > 0 LIMIT 1
